parameters.content:
## SMS Outreach (Outbound)

Runs every 30 minutes, 9am–5pm NZT (NZDT).

**What it does:**
- Reads all leads from the Leads tab
- Sends initial messages to new leads (cap: 25/run, 50/day)
- Sends Followup 1 to leads where initial was delivered 3h+ ago, no reply
- Sends Followup 2 to leads where F1 was delivered 21h+ ago, no reply
- Writes PENDING to the timestamp column immediately after each send
- Workflow 2 overwrites PENDING with confirmed timestamp on delivery, or clears it on failure
- Waits 60s between each SMS to avoid rate limits

**Why it exists:**
Automates the cold outreach cadence so the Mac doesn't need to stay on.
